rulings.Case Title: SARINDER "BOBBY" SANDHU et al VS. EASTOPEN, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Motion For Supplemental Hearing Of Defendants' Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Plaintiff Dixon'S Complaint (Per Ex Parte Order)
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT EASTOPEN, INC., MOTION FOR SUPPLEMENTAL HEARING OF DEFENDANT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF DIXON'S COMPLAINT. GRANT-SUPPLEMENTAL HEARING RE CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD PLAINTIFF AGREES TO DISMISS. DENY-MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGEMENT RE PLAINTIFF ENGAGING IN PROTECTED ACTIVITY AND PLAINTIFF SUFFERRING ADVERSE EMPLOYMENT ACTION. "NEW ARGUMENT RE NOTICE/CAUSAL CONNECTION IMPROPER BECAUSE NOT IN ORIGINAL PAPERS AND REFUTING PLAINTIFF OPPOSITION" Prevailing party to prepare order. (302/REQ/RS)
